name: RPC6
notes: Retroid Pocket Classic 6, Snapdragon G1 Gen2 (parrot), GammaOS Next Android 14 GSI reference device.

name: RG476H
notes: Anbernic RG476H, Unisoc ums9620 (ums9620_2h10), GammaOS Lite Android 14. GPU via devfreq (23140000.gpu), fan via hwmon0 pwm-fan (pwm1 duty cycle, no RPM reporting).
